sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.heading: PART II: TEMPLATE RELATED INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: Instructions related to specific reporting templates.

sections.heading: 4. Operational Risk Templates
sections.description: Overview of templates related to operational risk.

sections.heading: 4.1. Reporting of own funds requirements for Operational risk
sections.description: Instructions for reporting own funds requirements for operational risk.

sections.heading: 4.1.1. General Remarks
sections.description: General instructions regarding the reporting of operational risk.

sections.heading: 4.1.2. C 16.01 Operational Risk – Own funds requirements (OPR OFR)
sections.description: Details on the C 16.01 template for reporting operational risk own funds requirements.

sections.heading: 4.2. Operational Risk: Detailed information on losses in the last year (OPR DETAILS)
sections.description: Instructions for reporting detailed information on operational risk losses.

sections.heading: 4.2.1. General Remarks
sections.description: General instructions regarding the reporting of operational risk losses.

sections.heading: 4.2.2. C 17.01: Operational risk losses and recoveries by business lines and loss event types in the last year (OPR DETAILS 1)
sections.description: Details on the C 17.01 template for reporting operational risk losses and recoveries.

sections.heading: 4.2.2.1. General Remarks
sections.description: General instructions regarding the C 17.01 template.

sections.heading: 4.2.2.2. Instructions concerning specific positions
sections.description: Specific instructions for reporting positions in the C 17.01 template.

sections.heading: 4.2.3. C 17.02: Operational risk: Detailed information on the largest loss events in the last year (OPR DETAILS 2)
sections.description: Details on the C 17.02 template for reporting the largest operational risk loss events.

sections.heading: 4.2.3.1. General Remarks
sections.description: General instructions regarding the C 17.02 template.

sections.heading: 4.2.3.2. Instructions concerning specific positions
sections.description: Specific instructions for reporting positions in the C 17.02 template.

C 16.01.name: C 16.01 Operational Risk – Own funds requirements (OPR OFR)
C 16.01.description: Reports the own funds requirements for operational risk under the Business Indicator Component (BIC).
C 16.01.section_heading: 4.1.2. C 16.01 Operational Risk – Own funds requirements (OPR OFR)

C 17.01.name: C 17.01: Operational risk losses and recoveries by business lines and loss event types in the last year (OPR DETAILS 1)
C 17.01.description: Summarises information on losses and recoveries above internal thresholds registered by an institution in the last year by event types and business lines.
C 17.01.section_heading: 4.2.2. C 17.01: Operational risk losses and recoveries by business lines and loss event types in the last year (OPR DETAILS 1)

C 17.02.name: C 17.02: Operational risk: Detailed information on the largest loss events in the last year (OPR DETAILS 2)
C 17.02.description: Provides detailed information on individual loss events entailing a gross loss amount of EUR100,000 or more.
C 17.02.section_heading: 4.2.3. C 17.02: Operational risk: Detailed information on the largest loss events in the last year (OPR DETAILS 2)
